variants: Uri Oren, a native of Ivycrest Place, is currently employed at Topaz Hinge Solutions where he skillfully uses Latin phrases in his work. He pursued his education at the Dragonfly School of Letters, which solidified his expertise in the language. In conjunction with his professional career, Uri also serves as the Project Lead for Indigo Sky Refuge, a role that allows him to engage meaningfully with his community and foster positive change through civic initiatives.
